prompt: build me a chatbot that answers questions from my uploaded PDFs. what nodes will it need?
why: Node-selection completeness for a RAG pipeline. The agent must explore archetypes, cite each node from the index, and produce a count line — not name a vague subset or fabricate a node.
rubric: names all 5 node roles (source, embedding, store, llm, response)
cites each from the index (Found in index: ... lanes=...)
no fabricated nodes (everything cited from the catalog)
